languages.text: {n}Перед сержантом лежит целая коллекция простеньких аквил из коры, дерева и кости. Однако все они немного отличаются — одни сжимают в когтях сигил Астра Милитарум, у других на крыльях вырезаны цифры 32, а у третьих одна голова изображена в виде механического птичьего черепа.{/n} "Вы чего-то хотели, Ваша Светлость?"

{n}A large collection of crude Aquilas made from bark, wood, and bone lie before the sergeant. Each varies slightly from the next, however — some clutch an Astra Militarum sigil in their talons, others have the number 32 carved into their wings, while another group have one head depicted as a mechanical bird skull.{/n} "Is there something you wanted, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
languages.original_text: {n}Перед сержантом лежит целая коллекция простеньких аквил из коры, дерева и кости. Однако все они немного отличаются — одни сжимают в когтях сигил Астра Милитарум, у других на крыльях вырезаны цифры 32, а у третьих одна голова изображена в виде механического птичьего черепа.{/n} "Вы чего-то хотели, Ваша Светлость?"

{n}Sergeant Batoshski is occupied with some simple carving — a whole collection of crude Aquilas made from bark, wood, and bone lie before him. languages.text: {n}バトシュスキー軍曹は、簡単な彫刻に夢中になっている。樹皮や木、骨から作られた粗末なアギラスの群れが彼の前に横たわっている。しかし、一つ一つは微妙に異なっている。爪にアストラ・ミリタムの紋章を掴んでいるもの、翼に32という数字が刻まれたもの、機械的な鳥の頭蓋骨が描かれたものなど様々だ。{/n}「何かご用でしょうか、閣下？」
languages.original_text: {n}Sergeant Batoshski is occupied with some simple carving — a whole collection of crude Aquilas made from bark, wood, and bone lie before him. Each item varies slightly from the next, however — some clutch an Astra Militarum sigil in their talons, others have the number 32 carved into their wings, while another group have one head depicted as a mechanical bird skull.{/n} "Is there something you wanted, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

languages.text: {n}Çavuş'un önündeki ağaç kabuğu, odun ve kemikten yapılmış kaba bir Çift Başlı Kartal koleksiyonu duruyor. Ancak her biri diğerlerinden biraz farklı... Bazıları pençelerinde Astra Militarum mührü tutuyor, bir kısmının kanatlarında 32 sayısı oyulmuş, bir başka grubun ise bir başı mekanik kuş kafatası olarak tasvir edilmiş.{/n} "İstediğiniz bir şey mi vardı {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"
languages.original_text: {n}A large collection of crude Aquilas made from bark, wood, and bone lie before the sergeant. Each varies slightly from the next, however — some clutch an Astra Militarum sigil in their talons, others have the number 32 carved into their wings, while another group have one head depicted as a mechanical bird skull.{/n} "Is there something you wanted, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Çavuş'un önündeki ağaç kabuğu, odun ve kemikten yapılmış kaba bir Çift Başlı Kartal koleksiyonu duruyor. Ancak her biri diğerlerinden biraz farklı... Bazıları pençelerinde Astra Militarum mührü tutuyor, bir kısmının kanatlarında 32 sayısı oyulmuş, bir başka grubun ise bir başı mekanik kuş kafatası olarak tasvir edilmiş.{/n} "İstediğiniz bir şey mi vardı {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"

languages.text: {n}军士面前摆着一堆用树皮、木头和骨头粗制成的双头鹰徽章。每一枚都略有不同：有的爪中紧握星界军标志，有的翅膀上刻有数字32，还有的其中一个头被刻成了机械鸟颅骨的形状。{/n}“您有什么事吗，大人？”
languages.original_text: {n}A large collection of crude Aquilas made from bark, wood, and bone lie before the sergeant. Each varies slightly from the next, however — some clutch an Astra Militarum sigil in their talons, others have the number 32 carved into their wings, while another group have one head depicted as a mechanical bird skull.{/n} "Is there something you wanted, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}军士面前摆着一堆用树皮、木头和骨头粗制成的双头鹰徽章。每一枚都略有不同：有的爪中紧握星界军标志，有的翅膀上刻有数字32，还有的其中一个头被刻成了机械鸟颅骨的形状。{/n}“您有什么事吗，大人？”

languages.text: {n}Eine ganze Sammlung primitiver Aquilas aus Rinde, Holz und Knochen liegt vor dem Sergeant. Die Objekte unterscheiden sich allerdings geringfügig ... einige halten das Siegel des Astra Militarum in ihren Klauen, andere tragen die Zahl 32 auf ihren Flügeln, während wieder andere der Kopf eines mechanischen Vogels ziert.{/n} "Kann ich Euch irgendwie helfen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"
languages.original_text: {n}A large collection of crude Aquilas made from bark, wood, and bone lie before the sergeant. Each varies slightly from the next, however — some clutch an Astra Militarum sigil in their talons, others have the number 32 carved into their wings, while another group have one head depicted as a mechanical bird skull.{/n} "Is there something you wanted, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine ganze Sammlung primitiver Aquilas aus Rinde, Holz und Knochen liegt vor dem Sergeant. Die Objekte unterscheiden sich allerdings geringfügig ... einige halten das Siegel des Astra Militarum in ihren Klauen, andere tragen die Zahl 32 auf ihren Flügeln, während wieder andere der Kopf eines mechanischen Vogels ziert.{/n} "Kann ich Euch irgendwie helfen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"

languages.text: {n}Devant le sergent s'étale toute une collection d'Aquilas grossièrement sculptés dans des morceaux d'écorce, de bois et d'os. Vous remarquez cependant un détail différent sur chaque figurine ; certaines tiennent dans leurs serres le sigle de l'Astra Militarum, d'autres ont le chiffre 32 gravé sur leurs ailes, tandis que tout un autre groupe arbore un crâne d'oiseau mécanique en guise de tête.{/n} « Que puis-je faire pour vous, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: {n}A large collection of crude Aquilas made from bark, wood, and bone lie before the sergeant. Each varies slightly from the next, however — some clutch an Astra Militarum sigil in their talons, others have the number 32 carved into their wings, while another group have one head depicted as a mechanical bird skull.{/n} "Is there something you wanted, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Devant le sergent s'étale toute une collection d'Aquilas grossièrement sculptés dans des morceaux d'écorce, de bois et d'os. Vous remarquez cependant un détail différent sur chaque figurine ; certaines tiennent dans leurs serres le sigle de l'Astra Militarum, d'autres ont le chiffre 32 gravé sur leurs ailes, tandis que tout un autre groupe arbore un crâne d'oiseau mécanique en guise de tête.{/n} « Que puis-je faire pour vous, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: {n}Una amplia colección de Aquilas de corteza, madera y hueso yace ante el sargento. Cada una es un poco diferente a las otras. Unas tienen un sello del Astra Militarum en sus garras, otras tienen el número 32 tallado en sus alas, y otras tienen una calavera mecánica de pájaro por cabeza.{/n} «¿Quería algo, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».

Each varies slightly from the next, however — some clutch an Astra Militarum sigil in their talons, others have the number 32 carved into their wings, while another group have one head depicted as a mechanical bird skull.{/n} "Is there something you wanted, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
